description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a bold red headband and earcup exteriors, contrasted by black cushioned ear pads. The headband is smoothly curved and appears to be made of sturdy plastic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The earcups are circular and padded, designed to comfortably enclose the ears and provide noise isolation. The inner side of the headband features a black strip, likely for added comfort and grip. The headphones have a modern, streamlined design with minimal visible controls or branding. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for extended use in urban environments.
description: A pair of red and black over-ear headphones with cushioned ear pads and a glossy, curved headband.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earcups and the full arch of the red headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headband and the circular shape of the earcup.
description_view_2: Another front view, similar to view 0, displaying the earcups and headband arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the headband's width and earcup profile.
